title: American kids are eating more junk food | HS Insider
description: With the increased consumption of ultra-processed junk food, many American children are not receiving the nutrients needed to thrive.
bodyText: by Ingrid Eckermann | Arts and Entertainment Editor’s note: This article discusses sensitive topics including self-harm.
